title: Assistant Store Manager - GAP India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - GAP India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!
